item.title: 自主拓扑突变：面向多智能体大语言模型系统的安全运行时重构
item.summary: arXiv:2607.20488v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multi-agent LLM frameworks typically fix their team topology at boot time. When an individual agent becomes overloaded at runtime, for example by mixing too many action categories, accumulating tool errors, or queueing behind too many calls, the system has no mechanism to
